Personalized menu for your health

Your health info stays on your device and is automatically deleted after 2 hours. Our software protects your medical privacy and is never shared with waitstaff.

Health Conditions

Diabetes (type 2)Locks limits on high glycemic spikes
High blood pressureHighlights sodium sodium guardrails
PregnantBlocks raw food or bacteria vectors

Allergies & Intolerances
